name: Volcano and Earth Layers Lab
description: Explore volcano eruptions, magma movement, and Earth's crust, mantle, and core layers.
subject: geography
defaultHints: Where does magma travel before it becomes lava?
Which Earth layer is the thinnest?
How does eruption strength change what you observe above the crater?
safetyNotes: Real volcanic areas can release heat, ash, and gases. Observe volcanoes only from safe, guided distances.
